_comment: WinDeploy settings.json - Edit this file to customise your deployment.

TimeSync._comment: Runs first so every later stage (TLS, Windows Update, code-signing, Tailscale auth) sees a correct clock.
TimeSync._comment_NtpServers: First entry wins. time.windows.com left in but Google/Cloudflare ahead because MS NTP has historically been flaky from non-domain clients.
TimeSync._comment_ClearRTU: Dell ships BIOS=local time. The old WinTweaks tweak set RealTimeIsUniversal=1 which made Windows interpret BIOS as UTC and shifted the wall clock by the timezone offset. Set to false only if you dual-boot Linux on the same machine.
TimeSync._comment_Retries: If verification fails (Source still 'Local CMOS Clock' after polling), TimeSync returns RebootRequired and the orchestrator reboots. After MaxRebootRetries the stage returns Failed and halts the deploy.

WindowsUpdate._comment_Engine: Engine = native Windows Update Agent COM API (Microsoft.Update.Session). Software searches go through the Microsoft Update service; drivers go through the default Windows Update service (MU rejects Type='Driver' with WU_E_INVALID_CRITERIA 0x80240032).
WindowsUpdate._comment_DCU: After Windows Update drains to zero pending, run Dell Command | Update for BIOS / firmware / OEM drivers that don't flow through Microsoft Update.

PowerSettings._comment_PowerPlan: Ultimate = duplicate the hidden Ultimate Performance template and activate it (falls back to High Performance if duplication is blocked, e.g. Home SKUs). High = activate the always-present High Performance plan directly.
PowerSettings._comment_Buttons: When true, lid close / sleep button / power button are pinned to 'Do nothing' on AC and DC. Set false to keep Windows defaults.
PowerSettings._comment_Sleep: When true, display-off / sleep / hibernate timeouts are pinned to Never on AC and DC.
PowerSettings._comment_HiberFile: When true, runs 'powercfg /hibernate off' to reclaim hiberfil.sys disk space.

WinTweaks._comment_Timezone: Timezone moved to Stages.TimeSync as of 2026-05-16. This key is ignored.
WinTweaks._comment_StartMenuAlign: Windows 11 taskbar/Start alignment. 'Left' or 'Center'. Win10 ignores the key. Takes effect on next Explorer restart (Cleanup reboot covers it).

ConfigureDellUpdates._comment: Runs after both Dell apps are installed. Configures SupportAssist for unattended auto-consent (best-effort registry tweaks) and registers a recurring SYSTEM-context dcu-cli sweep so Dell BIOS/firmware/driver updates keep flowing after the one-shot deploy.

InstallDellSupportAssist._comment_LocalPath: Path relative to /apps folder, or an absolute path. Checked first.
InstallDellSupportAssist._comment_DownloadUrl: Used as fallback if LocalPath is absent or missing.
InstallDellSupportAssist._comment_SilentArgs: See Dell SupportAssist admin guide for current flags.

InstallRustDesk._comment_InstallerType: WINGET_MANIFEST: winget install --manifest with a locally-generated YAML pointing at the vendor's direct URL. Used because RustDesk.RustDesk was removed from winget-pkgs in March 2026 so the plain WINGET path cannot resolve it. winget still handles download, SHA256 verification, silent args, and exit codes.

InstallDellPowerManager._comment_SilentArgs_PM: Dell Power Manager uses standard NSIS or InnoSetup flags.

Tailscale._comment_AuthKey: Set a pre-auth key from tailscale.com/settings/keys to skip the QR flow entirely.
Tailscale._comment_Hostname: Leave blank to use the Windows computer name.

Notifications._comment: Webhook URL for Slack, Teams, or any service accepting JSON POST. Leave empty to disable.
